CYP3A4.source: Approximate CYP3A4 ontogeny, PMA-based Hill form (Salem et al. 2013; Anderson & Holford 2008 framework)

renal_GFR.source: Rhodin et al. 2009 glomerular filtration rate maturation model

UGT2B7.source: Approximate UGT2B7 / morphine clearance ontogeny, simplified to PMA-based Hill form (cf. Bouwmeester et al. 2004; Anand et al. 2008)
